englishDefinitions: (transitive) To harm (someone); to insult or verbally abuse (someone); to hurt (someone).
persianTranslation: مترادف کلمه cut in (برای شامل کردن)
(متعدی) آسیب رساندن به (کسی); توهین کردن یا توهین کلامی به (کسی)؛ آزار دادن (کسی).
examples: That's when I started cutting into them.
His guilt had cut into him, leaving him depressed.
